notes: Runs just about well enough to make progress but has numerous issues. Getting movies working (Eg. Intro/Endings) required: `winetricks quartz`, disabling `winegstreamer` in winecfg and manually installing LAVFilters to the prefix. Best played in windowed mode; scene transitions tended to cause the game to lock-up when in fullscreen. The game has persistent sprite and text flickering that I have been unable to improve and the system config window's layout/size is mangled.  Non of the usual tweaks appeared to have any impact and the same issues occur in wine-staging too.
title: The Labyrinth of Grisaia

notes: Flicker Fix: <render_always>1</render_always> inside <APP></APP> (line 45) in the config/startup.xml file.
title: The Labyrinth of Grisaia
